message:
test(e2e): add E2E test result artifacts from extension conformance runs

Include 7 E2E test run directories with summary.tsv outputs from the
extension conformance pipeline. These provide regression baselines and
audit trails for extension load/dispatch behavior across test sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
